title: Non-IRIS_4002_baseline
treatment_protocol_ch1: Whole blood from patients were drawn into Tempus Blood Tubes directly and stored at -20C until RNA extraction
growth_protocol_ch1: Whole blood from patients were drawn into Tempus Blood Tubes directly and stored at -20C until RNA extraction
extract_protocol_ch1: RNA from whole blood (in Tempus) was extracted using 5Prime PerfectPure RNA Blood kit according the manufacturer's protocol. Quality control was performed with Agilent Bioanalyser.
label_protocol_ch1: Biotinylated cRNA were prepared with Life Technologies' Illumina TotalPrep-96 RNA Amplification kit
data_processing: The data were normalised using 75 Percentile Shift using GeneSpring GX 12.6.1 software.  For normalization, week 0 samples were baseline transformed to the median of all samples. For all other weeks, samples were baseline transformed either to the median of all samples or to the corresponding week 0 values. Samples 5411298027_F and 5412485008_F do not have a corresponding baseline and were therefore excluded in the analysis for the latter.  The data tables on each sample record represents the normalization to the median of all samples.  Data normalized to the corresponding week 0 values can be found on the series level.
